zh.lifeSummary: 當Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle於大約1060年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓時，他的父親Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes22歲，母親Belanne de Keddington18歲。他於1079年與Hildegarde de Penthièvre在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1102年住在英國越可爾且於1102年住在英國英格蘭越可爾。他去世於1134年1月7日在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle于大约1060年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓时，他的父亲Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes22岁，母亲Belanne de Keddington18岁。他于1079年与Hildegarde de Penthièvre在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1102年住在英国越可爾且于1102年住在英国英格兰越可爾。他去世于1134年1月7日在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Musard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Durham): nickname or occupational name from Middle English mustard ‘mustard’ (Old French mostarde). The allusion could perhaps be to someone with a sharp tongue, but is probably usually to a dealer in mustard.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle was born about 1060, in Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, was 22 and his mother, Belanne de Keddington, was 18. He married Hildegarde de Penthièvre in 1079, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Yorkshire, England in 1102 and Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom in 1102. He died on 7 January 1134, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle est né environ 1060, à Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Belanne de Keddington, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Hildegarde de Penthièvre en 1079, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Everwyck, Angleterre en 1102 et à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1102. Il est décédé le 7 janvier 1134, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle um 1060 in Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes 22 und seine Mutter Belanne de Keddington 18. Er hat 1079 in Frankreich Hildegarde de Penthièvre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1102 hat er in Yorkshire, England und 1102 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb am 7. Januar 1134 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle è nato il circa 1060 nel Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Belanne de Keddington, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Hildegarde de Penthièvre nel 1079, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Yorkshire, England nel 1102 e nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1102. Morì il 7 gennaio 1134, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castleが約1060年にフランスブレタグンモービハンで生まれた時，父Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantesは22歳，母Belanne de Keddingtonは18歳であった。1079年にフランスでHildegarde de Penthièvreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1102年にはイギリスヨークシュアイアに，1102年にはイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアに住んでいた。彼は1134年1月7日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle(이)가 대략 1060년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Belanne de Keddington(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1079년 프랑스에서 Hildegarde de Penthièvre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1102년도에 영국 요르크실르에서, 1102년도에 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 살았다. 그는 1134년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Belanne de Keddington, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Hildegarde de Penthièvre em 1079, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Yorkshire, Inglaterra em 1102 e em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1102. Ele faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1134, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle родился около 1060 г. в местности морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Belanne de Keddington, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Hildegarde de Penthièvre в 1079 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности еркшир, Англия в 1102 году и в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в 1102 году. Он умер 7 января 1134 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Enisan Musard I, de Plevan, Constable of Richmond Castle nació aproximadamente 1060, en Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Roaldus de Musard Viscount of Nantes, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Belanne de Keddington, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Hildegarde de Penthièvre en 1079, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Yorkshire, Inglaterra en 1102 y en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1102. Murió el 7 de enero de 1134, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años.
